footer.tagline: Your trusted platform for degree homologation and access to education in Spain.

home.hero_title_accent: to education and residency in Spain
home.hero_subtitle: Degree recognition, university admissions, Spanish courses, student visas, and legal support. Over 15 years working officially with students from around the world.
home.hero_img_alt: International student smiling in front of the University of Salamanca
home.cta_start: Book a consultation with an expert
home.logo_bar_title: Our students study at Spain's top universities
home.services_subtitle: Three core areas and a team that supports you in everything else
home.service_homologacion_desc: We manage the entire process of homologating your university degree with the Spanish Ministry of Education.
home.service_universidad_desc: We help you with admission, selectividad, and enrollment at Spanish universities.
home.service_espanol_desc: Spanish courses for all levels with native and certified teachers.
home.approach_subtitle: Four principles we apply to every case, whatever your starting point
home.approach_1_desc: A personal tutor stays with you from start to finish. You always know who to ask.
home.approach_2_desc: Over 15 years working officially with Spanish educational institutions.
home.approach_3_desc: Personal account with real-time tracking, direct chat, and all your documents in one place.
home.approach_4_desc: Partnerships with Spanish universities, sworn translators, and chartered notaries.
home.cta_subtitle: Book a personal consultation with an expert. We'll review your case and build a plan tailored to you.
home.pin_hero_title_accent: to education and residency in Spain
home.pin_hero_subtitle: Degree recognition, university admissions, Spanish courses, student visas and legal support — over 15 years working officially with students from around the world.
home.pin_hero_reassure: Payment only after document review · We respond within a few hours
home.pin_services_sub: Most clients use two or three of these together. We coordinate them so you don't have to brief three offices about the same case.
home.pin_service_homologation_desc: We map your transcript to Spanish equivalents, file the dossier with the Ministry of Universities and stay on the case until the credencial arrives.
home.pin_service_university_desc: Bachelor, master and doctorate placements at 80+ Spanish universities. Program shortlist, application files, deadlines, scholarship review.
home.pin_service_spanish_desc: Intensive A1–C1 programs at accredited Cervantes schools, with the SIELE certificate at the end. Includes student visa support if you need it.
home.pin_compare_sub: An honest comparison. The state procedures are public — you can absolutely run them yourself. Here's what that involves.
home.pin_compare_row_1_them: Read the BOE yourself · Spanish required
home.pin_compare_row_1_us: Expert consultation, in your language, within 48h
home.pin_compare_row_2_them: Coordinate sworn translator + foreign ministry yourself
home.pin_compare_row_2_us: Sworn translator network · we handle the chain
home.pin_compare_row_3_us: Filed under power-of-attorney, you don't appear in person
home.pin_compare_row_4_us: We chase monthly · you get a status update each month
home.pin_pricing_sub: Transparent and honest. We charge only when we take the case — and not before your documents have been reviewed.
home.pin_plan_review_desc: We'll assess your case and identify the optimal route.
home.pin_plan_review_feat_2: Analysis of your degree, country and target profession
home.pin_plan_review_feat_3: Optimal route with a clear action plan
home.pin_plan_review_wa_message: Hello! I'd like to book an expert consultation (100 €).
home.pin_plan_full_desc: Full support for your degree recognition. Submission and case management at the Ministry.
home.pin_plan_path_desc: Homologation + university admission — the complete path.
home.pin_risk_item_1_title: Expert consultation on your documents first.
home.pin_risk_item_1_desc: We won't take your money until an expert has read your transcript and given you a realistic outcome forecast.
home.pin_risk_item_2_title: If we can't help, you owe nothing.
home.pin_risk_item_2_desc: If the outcome forecast is negative, we'll tell you. We'd rather pass on a case than take it knowing it'll fail.
home.pin_risk_item_3_desc: Payment milestones tied to case progress. Refund if a procedural rejection isn't recoverable on appeal.
home.pin_dash_sub: Every case lives in a personal dashboard. Real-time status, document upload, advisor chat. No more email chains.
home.pin_reach_sub: We work in Spanish, English and Russian. Most of our clients are in Latin America, Eastern Europe and the post-Soviet space — three regions where Spain's degree-recognition rules are particularly opaque.
home.pin_test_sub: Real reviews. We don't pay for testimonials and we don't edit them. The good and the candid — both on file.
home.pin_test_1_quote: My medical degree from Caracas got the Ministry's stamp 14 months after we filed. The team chased every single deadline so I didn't have to. I'm starting residency in Valencia in October.
home.pin_test_2_quote: They told me up front my engineering degree would lose two semesters in homologation. That honesty saved me from spending money on an outcome I wouldn't have liked. We went the master's-equivalence route instead.
home.pin_test_3_quote: WhatsApp answers within hours, monthly status updates I didn't have to chase, and they handled the consulate appointment when my visa file got bounced. Worth every euro.
home.pin_final_title: Start with an expert consultation on your documents.
home.pin_final_sub: Send us your transcript. Within 48 hours, an expert will tell you whether Spain will recognize your degree, in how long, and what it will cost. No card, no commitment.

homologacion.hero_subtitle: Expert guidance, a personal advisor and a personal dashboard with real-time tracking. Serving clients worldwide.
homologacion.hero_photo_alt: Historic streets of Salamanca next to the university quarter
homologacion.compare_title: On your own or with us — an honest comparison
homologacion.compare_subtitle: What homologating a degree in Spain actually involves. No exaggeration — just the steps someone has to take.
homologacion.compare_row_docs_without: 20+ forms and certificates from 4 government bodies — collected by you
homologacion.compare_row_docs_with: 6 scans uploaded to your dashboard — we gather the rest
homologacion.compare_row_languages_without: All forms and correspondence in Spanish, some in legal English
homologacion.compare_row_languages_with: Advisor and interface in ES / EN / RU — write in your own language
homologacion.compare_row_apostille_without: You source the sworn translator, notary and apostille yourself
homologacion.compare_row_apostille_with: Handled through our vetted partners — no searching, no markup
homologacion.compare_row_submission_without: Electronic filing via FNMT certificate or in-person visit
homologacion.compare_row_submission_with: We file on your behalf with real-time online tracking
homologacion.compare_row_timing_without: 8–14 months, plus the risk of documents being returned at any stage
homologacion.compare_row_timing_with: 6–12 months, 24/7 status in your dashboard, advance heads-up at every step
homologacion.compare_row_rejection_without: You handle it alone — repaying fees and starting over
homologacion.compare_row_rejection_with: We analyze the reasons and help with the appeal or an alternative route
homologacion.adv_subtitle: An expert service for those who value reliability, transparency and results.
homologacion.adv_advisor_desc: One specialist handles your case from start to finish. You always know who to contact.
homologacion.adv_expertise_desc: We know the Ministry's requirements for every degree type. We anticipate issues before they arise.
homologacion.adv_transparency_desc: Application status, documents and communication history with your advisor — in your dashboard 24/7.
homologacion.adv_partners_desc: Sworn translators, notaries, apostille — a network of partners we trust.
homologacion.what_desc: Homologation is the official recognition of your foreign degree in Spain, opening the door to professional practice and further education.
homologacion.what_legal_desc: Your degree will have official recognition throughout Spain.
homologacion.what_work_desc: You can practice your profession and access the Spanish job market.
homologacion.what_study_desc: Access master's and postgraduate programs at Spanish universities.
homologacion.dashboard_title: Full Control — From Anywhere in the World
homologacion.dashboard_subtitle: Track the process, exchange documents and communicate with your advisor in your personal dashboard. No calls, no waiting for messenger replies.
homologacion.dash_realtime_desc: Every update on your case is reflected instantly — you're always informed.
homologacion.dash_secure_desc: All documents are uploaded and stored in a protected cloud.
homologacion.dash_chat_desc: Ask questions and get answers right in the platform.
homologacion.dash_notifications_desc: Email and push notifications — you won't miss a single update.
homologacion.process_1_desc: We review your degree and define the optimal homologation path.
homologacion.process_2_desc: We help with apostille, sworn translation and all required certificates.
homologacion.process_3_desc: We file the application and monitor every step — you track progress in your dashboard.
homologacion.process_4_desc: We notify you of the result and help with any additional requirements if needed.
homologacion.testimonials_subtitle: Real results from people who trusted us with their degree homologation.
homologacion.testimonial_1_text: My engineering degree homologation took 8 months. My advisor was in touch at every stage, I tracked all documents in my dashboard. Highly recommend!
homologacion.testimonial_2_text: I thought homologating a medical degree was impossible. Space for Edu found the optimal route and guided me through to the resolution. Now I work in my profession.
homologacion.testimonial_3_text: My daughter was enrolling in a Spanish university and needed her diploma homologated. Everything was fast and professional, we didn't have to worry about anything.
homologacion.proof_subtitle: From Russia and CIS to Latin America and the Middle East — we help achieve degree recognition in Spain.
homologacion.timeline_desc: The process can take between 6 months and 2 years depending on the type of degree and processing route.
homologacion.cost_desc: Check our pricing page for updated rates on all our services.
homologacion.faq_1_q: How long does the homologation process take?
homologacion.faq_1_a: It depends on the type of degree and processing route. Generally between 6 months and 2 years. Your advisor keeps you informed at every step through your personal dashboard.
homologacion.faq_2_q: Do I need sworn translations of my documents?
homologacion.faq_2_a: Yes, all documents not in Spanish must be translated by an official sworn translator. We work with verified translators and help organize the translation.
homologacion.faq_3_q: Can I work while waiting for the resolution?
homologacion.faq_3_a: It depends on your work situation and residence permit. In many cases, it's possible with a conditional registration certificate.
homologacion.faq_4_q: What happens if my homologation is denied?
homologacion.faq_4_a: We analyze the reasons for denial and propose a strategy: appeal, supplementary exams or alternative routes.
homologacion.faq_5_q: What's the difference between homologation and equivalence?
homologacion.faq_5_a: Homologation recognizes your degree as equivalent to a specific Spanish one. Equivalence recognizes a general academic level without a specific title.
homologacion.consultation_dialog_desc: A 60-minute personal consultation with an expert who will analyze your case and create an action plan.
homologacion.consultation_dialog_item_1: Analysis of your degree and homologation type determination
homologacion.consultation_dialog_item_2: Complete list of required documents for your specific case

homologacion.consultation_dialog_item_4: Step-by-step action plan with specific recommendations

homologacion.crosssell_desc: Alongside homologation, many clients arrive with half-fluent Spanish or plan to keep studying. We handle it in parallel — so you don't lose months bouncing between offices.

homologacion.pin_test_1_quote: My engineering degree homologation took 8 months. My advisor was in touch at every stage and I knew the file's status at any moment.
homologacion.pin_test_2_quote: I thought homologating a medical degree was impossible. Space for Edu found the optimal route and guided me through to resolution. I work in my profession again.

universidad.hero_subtitle: We'll find the right university and program for your goals, prepare your documents, and guide you through to enrollment. You won't face Spanish bureaucracy alone.
universidad.hero_img_alt: International graduates celebrating after admission to a Spanish university
universidad.adv_subtitle: We don't guess — we analyze your situation and guide you every step of the way.
universidad.adv_matching_desc: We analyze your degree, field, budget, and city — then suggest 3-5 programs that actually fit.
universidad.adv_support_desc: We handle documents, translations, and apostilles. We submit and track — you focus on life.
universidad.adv_local_title: Based in Spain, we know the rules
universidad.adv_local_desc: We live here, speak Spanish, and know each university's requirements firsthand. We don't Google it — we know.
universidad.adv_combo_desc: If you need degree recognition, we run both processes in parallel. No wasted year.
universidad.type_grado_desc: Access to bachelor's programs through high school homologation and selectividad (EBAU/PCE).
universidad.type_master_desc: Direct access to master's programs with your homologated or equivalent degree.
universidad.type_fp_desc: Access to intermediate and higher vocational training programs.
universidad.process_1_desc: We discuss your goals, review your documents, and assess your situation.
universidad.process_2_desc: We suggest 3-5 fitting university and program options for your profile.
universidad.process_3_desc: Translations, apostilles, motivation letter — we prepare the full application package.
universidad.process_4_desc: We submit and track deadlines. You'll be informed at every step.
universidad.process_5_desc: We help with registration, fee payments, and your first steps at university.
universidad.testimonial_1_text: I had no idea how to apply to a university in Spain. Space for Edu found the right program, prepared everything for me — in 3 months I received my admission letter.
universidad.testimonial_1_role: Master's in Economics, Universidad de Barcelona
universidad.testimonial_2_text: They handled homologation and admission at the same time. I saved a whole year and got into the university I wanted, stress-free.
universidad.testimonial_3_text: I consulted them before even moving to Spain. They explained everything clearly: what documents I needed, timelines, and real costs. No surprises.
universidad.faq_1_a: In most cases, you'll need your previous degree homologated. If it's required, we run both processes in parallel so you don't lose time.
universidad.faq_2_q: What documents do I need to apply?
universidad.faq_2_a: It depends on the level (bachelor's, master's, vocational), but typically: original diploma, transcripts, sworn translation, apostille, and motivation letter. We prepare the full package for you.
universidad.faq_3_q: How much does studying in Spain cost?
universidad.faq_3_a: Public university fees range from €700 to €2,500/year for bachelor's, and €1,500 to €5,000 for master's. We advise on available scholarships.
universidad.faq_4_q: When should I start the process?
universidad.faq_4_a: Ideally 6-8 months before the academic year starts. Admission deadlines vary, and starting early gives you more options.
universidad.faq_5_a: We guide you on student visa requirements and help prepare the necessary documentation for your application.
universidad.cta_subtitle: Book an expert consultation — we'll assess your case in 30 minutes.
universidad.crosssell_title: Going to study in Spanish but your level isn't quite there?
universidad.crosssell_desc: We prepare the language alongside the admission — Spanish courses tailored for university students and DELE prep. If you also need to homologate a secondary diploma or prior degree, we run it in parallel.
universidad.pin_hero_subtitle: Program selection, application support, EVAU/PCE coordination, enrollment. We handle the entire admission process — public and private universities, undergraduate, master, and FP.
universidad.pin_compare_sub: What you'd handle on your own — and what we take off your plate.

universidad.pin_compare_row_4_us: Direct contact with admissions offices in your name

espanol.hero_subtitle: Individual and group lessons with certified teachers. From A1 to C2, DELE preparation. Online or in-person in Spain.
espanol.hero_img_alt: International students focused in a Spanish class with a native teacher
espanol.map_rank_label: most spoken language by native speakers
espanol.formats_subtitle: Every format is available online and in-person in Spain
espanol.format_individual_desc: Tailored to your goals and pace. 100% teacher attention, maximum progress.
espanol.format_group_desc: 4–6 students. Speaking practice, pair work, dynamic atmosphere.
espanol.format_intensive_desc: Accelerated course for those who need results fast. 3–5 classes per week.
espanol.journey_subtitle: Each level unlocks new opportunities. We'll show you where you are and how far you can go.
espanol.journey_beginner_1: Introduce yourself, order at a restaurant, ask for directions
espanol.journey_beginner_2: Fill out documents for NIE and empadronamiento
espanol.journey_beginner_3: Hold a simple conversation with your neighbors
espanol.journey_intermediate_1: Pass a job interview in Spain
espanol.journey_intermediate_3: Pass DELE B2 — the most in-demand certificate
espanol.journey_advanced_1: Work in your field without language barriers
espanol.journey_advanced_2: Read professional literature and news with ease
espanol.journey_advanced_3: Pass DELE C1 for academic and professional career
espanol.steps_subtitle: From application to your first lesson — 48 hours max
espanol.step_1_desc: Fill out the form in 30 seconds. We'll contact you the same day to schedule your trial lesson.
espanol.step_2_title: Take a trial lesson with your teacher
espanol.step_2_desc: A real class, not a test. Your teacher assesses your level on the CEFR scale and understands how you learn best.
espanol.step_3_title: Get your personalized plan and schedule
espanol.step_3_desc: Program tailored to your level, goals, and lifestyle. Preparing for DELE? A dedicated track with deadlines.
espanol.step_4_title: Start learning in your personal dashboard
espanol.step_4_desc: Schedule, video calls, materials, and progress — all in one place. Reschedule with 24h notice, no penalties.
espanol.adv_subtitle: Not just lessons — a system that delivers results
espanol.adv_native_desc: All teachers are Spanish nationals with teaching degrees and ELE certification. Not just native speakers — professionals.
espanol.adv_dele_desc: Specialized course with official Instituto Cervantes materials. 85% of our students pass on the first attempt.
espanol.adv_method_desc: Articles, subjunctive, ser/estar — we know where Russian speakers struggle and focus specifically on that.
espanol.adv_flexible_desc: Morning, afternoon, or evening classes. Reschedule with 24h notice, no penalties. No rigid schedules.
espanol.proof_dele: pass DELE on the first attempt
espanol.proof_months: months — average time to gain 1 level
espanol.crosssell_title: Learning Spanish for study or work in Spain?
espanol.crosssell_desc: We also help with degree homologation and university admission. We manage all processes in parallel — you don't lose time.
espanol.faq_1_a: During the consultation your teacher will assess your level on the CEFR scale (A1–C2) and suggest a suitable program.
espanol.faq_2_a: Pricing depends on your level, format and volume of classes. We'll find the best option during the consultation based on your goals and budget.
espanol.faq_3_q: Can I study online from another country?
espanol.faq_3_a: Yes, about 40% of our students study remotely from Russia, CIS, and other countries. You just need stable internet — classes are via Zoom.
espanol.faq_4_q: How long does DELE preparation take?
espanol.faq_4_a: Depends on your current level and goal. On average: B2 preparation from B1 — 3–4 months at 2–3 classes per week. We create an individual schedule tied to the exam date.
espanol.faq_5_q: How are you different from a regular language school?
espanol.faq_5_a: We work exclusively with Russian-speaking students in Spain. We know the context: homologation, NIE, university admission. Our teachers understand the typical challenges of transitioning from Russian to Spanish. Plus a personal dashboard with progress tracking.
espanol.cta_subtitle: Trial lesson with an expert consultation. Your teacher will assess your level and create a study plan.

precios.testimonial_2_quote: We were worried about the complexity of homologation, but the team made it simple. They kept us informed at every step. Professional service from start to finish.

precios.compare_feature_12: Personal strategy session before we start
precios.risk_title: No risk — pay only after document review
precios.risk_desc: We review your documents first and confirm we can help before you pay anything. If we can't assist with your case, you owe nothing.
precios.faq_1_q: When do I have to pay?
precios.faq_1_a: Payment is made once your documentation is reviewed and we confirm we can help. We don't charge upfront without verification.
precios.faq_2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
precios.faq_2_a: Secure card payment via Stripe — to the account of an official Spanish legal entity.
precios.faq_3_a: Our rates include all indicated services. Government fees (from the Ministry) are paid separately directly to the institution.
precios.faq_4_q: How long does the homologation process take?
precios.faq_4_a: The timeline depends on the Ministry's processing queue. Typically 6–12 months, but we expedite document preparation to minimize delays on our end.
precios.faq_5_q: What documents do I need to get started?
precios.faq_5_a: Generally: your degree diploma, academic transcript, passport, and apostilled documents. We provide a complete checklist specific to your case during the initial review.
precios.faq_6_q: What happens if my homologation is denied?
precios.faq_6_a: Denials are rare with proper preparation. If it happens, we review the decision, advise on next steps, and assist with appeals or alternative pathways at no extra charge.
precios.cta_subtitle: Choose a plan or book a consultation — we'll help you pick the right option.
precios.pin_pricing_sub: All plans start with an expert consultation on your documents. We charge only after we confirm we can take your case.
precios.pin_risk_item_1_desc: We review your documents first and tell you, honestly, whether your case is viable. If we can't help, you owe nothing.
precios.pin_risk_item_2_desc: Single point of contact through your whole case. No call-centres, no ticket queues.
precios.pin_risk_item_3_desc: Split the fee across the case timeline. No interest, no extra fees.
precios.pin_test_sub: Real cases, real outcomes. Names and locations are theirs.
precios.pin_test_1_quote: Space for Edu handled everything from document preparation to university enrollment. My son is now studying at the University of Barcelona. I couldn't have navigated this process alone.
precios.pin_test_2_quote: We were worried about the complexity of homologation, but the team made it simple. They kept us informed at every step. Professional service from start to finish.
precios.pin_test_3_quote: The VIP service was worth every euro. Personal curator, Spanish classes, even visa guidance. My daughter felt supported from day one in Spain.
precios.pin_faq_sub: What clients ask before booking — answered up front.
precios.pin_final_title: Choose your plan. We'll handle the rest.
precios.pin_final_sub: 30-minute expert consultation before you pay anything. Worst case: you leave with a clear plan and a realistic budget.
precios.pin_final_side_title: What you'll leave the call with
precios.pin_final_side_3: Realistic timeline for your country and degree
precios.pin_final_side_4: Total cost — fees, sworn translations, apostilles
precios.plan_basico_footnote: * Sworn translations are not included in the price.
precios.spanish_courses_desc: Individual or small-group sessions. DELE exam and academic programme preparation.

consultation_success.title: We'll see you on WhatsApp!
consultation_success.desc: We've opened the chat. We reply within 30 minutes during business hours.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how Space for Edu processes personal data collected through this website.
privacy.data_body: We only collect the data you voluntarily provide when contacting us via WhatsApp, email or phone: name, contact details and the information you share about your case.
privacy.use_body: We use your data exclusively to respond to your enquiry and deliver the requested service. We do not sell or share it with third parties except where required by law.
privacy.rights_body: You can exercise the rights of access, rectification, deletion, restriction, portability and objection by writing to our contact email.

legal_notice.title: Legal notice
legal_notice.intro: In accordance with article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following details identify the owner of this website.
legal_notice.provider_body: Space for Edu. Service-provider details currently being updated. For any formal enquiry, please contact us via WhatsApp or email through the links in the footer.
legal_notice.purpose_body: This website provides information about our services — degree homologation, university admission and Spanish courses — and enables interested visitors to get in touch.
legal_notice.ip_body: All content on this site (text, images, logos and design) is owned by Space for Edu or its authors and is protected by applicable law. Reproduction, in whole or in part, requires prior authorisation.
legal_notice.liability_body: Space for Edu cannot guarantee the absence of errors in its content and reserves the right to modify it without notice. Links to third-party sites are provided for information only and do not imply endorsement.
legal_notice.law_body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Any dispute will be submitted to the courts of the user's place of residence, without prejudice to consumer rights.

cookies.title: Cookies policy
cookies.intro: This policy describes which cookies the Space for Edu website uses and what they are for.
cookies.what_body: Cookies are small files that a website stores on your device to remember your preferences and improve your experience.
cookies.usage_body: We use strictly necessary technical cookies for the site to function. With your consent, we may use analytics cookies via Google Tag Manager to understand how the site is used and to improve it. We do not use advertising cookies.
cookies.thirdparty_body: We use Google Tag Manager (Google LLC) to manage analytics tags. If you accept analytics cookies, GTM may install Google Analytics cookies. If you decline or choose only necessary cookies, GTM installs no tracking cookies. You can change your preference at any time using the "Manage preferences" button below.
cookies.manage_body: You can block or delete cookies through your browser settings. Doing so will not affect your use of the site.

cookie_banner.title: Cookies and privacy
cookie_banner.body: We use technical cookies necessary for the site to function. With your permission we may also use analytics cookies to understand how the site is used. We do not use advertising cookies.
cookie_banner.necessary_desc: Essential for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.
cookie_banner.analytics_desc: Help us understand how the site is used so we can improve it. Anonymous.
